checks.criterion: exactly one candidate selected with metadata-only ranking

Selection hash is recorded in effective_sheetmetal_reference_package.json, and reference_manifest content is marked opened only after selection freeze.
1110101 score 1156 is highest by the frozen formula; score terms and tie-break rule are recorded.
Sheetmetal reference is FORBIDDEN_REVIEWER_ONLY; generator receives no reference content, paths, or hashes.
Six AGENT_QUORUM_APPROVED_EVAL items enter source-only bundle; twelve quarantined items remain excluded; no approved item has completed-reference or post-design marker.
Bundle contains six sanitized CSVs, six previews, and required manifests only; reference_manifest.json and original workbooks are excluded.
verification_results.json is PASS with zero errors/warnings; all 17 bundle_hashes entries match actual SHA-256 values.
Audit and manifests record customer_drawing_generated=false; sheetmetal-v1 selected-candidate namespace contains no generated drawing files.
Bundled Git verified HEAD d3811931b0b317aad2ddba656e2dfe57b2ec252f and status before docs updates showed only intended new artifacts plus the known untracked corpus-screening script.

summary: Independent audit passed deterministic metadata-only selection, evaluator-only reference boundary, source exclusion rules, clean sanitized bundle contents, bundle verification, hash consistency, and no-customer-drawing boundary for selected project 1110101.
